lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਰਾਇ ਕਮਾਲਦੀ ਮੋਜਦੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਰਿ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree kee vaar mahalaa 5 raae kamaaladee mojadee kee vaar kee dhun upar gaavanee |
lines.english: Gauree Kee Vaar, Fifth Mehl: Sung To The Tune Of Vaar Of Raa-I Kamaaldee-Mojadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਜਪੈ ਸੋ ਆਇਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jo jan japai so aaeaa paravaan |
lines.english: Auspicious and approved is the birth of that humble being who chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਭਜਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan kai balihaaranai jin bhajiaa prabh nirabaan |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that humble being who vibrates and meditates on God, the Lord of Nirvaanaa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh kattiaa har bhettiaa purakh sujaan |
lines.english: The pains of birth and death are eradicated, upon meeting the All-knowing Lord, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sang saagar tare jan naanak sachaa taan |1|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, he crosses over the world-ocean; O servant Nanak, he has the strength and support of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਉ ਪਖਾਲਾ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਿਤ ਭਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: paau pakhaalaa tis ke man tan nit bhaavau |
lines.english: I wash His feet; He is always pleasing to my mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲਕੇ ਉਠਿ ਪਰਾਹੁਣਾ ਮੇਰੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhalake utth paraahunaa merai ghar aavau |
lines.english: I rise up in the early morning hours, and the Holy Guest comes into my home.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: grihu dhan sabh pavitru hoe har ke gun gaavau |
lines.english: My home and wealth are totally sanctified as I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam sune naam sangrahai naame liv laavau |
lines.english: I hear the Naam, and I gather in the Naam; I am lovingly attuned to the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਭਲਾ ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai so bhalaa sach teraa bhaanaa |
lines.english: Whatever pleases You is good; True is the Pleasure of Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naam vaapaaree naanakaa vaddabhaagee paavau |2|
lines.english: The Trader in the Lord's Name, O Nanak, is found by great good fortune. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: too sabh meh ek varatadaa sabh maeh samaanaa |
lines.english: You are the One, pervading in all; You are contained in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜੀਅ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahiaa jeea andar jaanaa |
lines.english: You are diffused throughout and permeating all places and interspaces; You are known to be deep within the hearts of all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee sad sad kurabaanaa |1|
lines.english: Nanak takes to the Sanctuary of God; he is forever and ever a sacrifice to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang mil paaeeai man sache bhaanaa |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and submitting to His Will, the True Lord is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਚੜਿ ਬੋਹਿਥਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur sev charr bohith bhaujal paar pau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, come aboard upon the boat of the service of the True Guru, and cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਾ ਈ ਤਾਂ ਚੇਤਿ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚਾ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: chetaa ee taan chet saahib sachaa so dhanee |
lines.english: If you are conscious, then be conscious of the True Lord, Your Lord and Master.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਨੀ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਹੋਏ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naal na chalanee jal bal hoe chhaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they will not go with him in the end; they shall be burnt to ashes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਊ ਸੰਦੇ ਕਪੜੇ ਪਹਿਰਹਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: vaaoo sande kaparre pahireh garab gavaar |
lines.english: He wears his body, like clothes of wind - what a proud fool he is!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਗੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੋ ਸਚੈ ਰਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: seee ubare jagai vich jo sachai rakhe |
lines.english: They alone are delivered from the world, who are preserved and protected by the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਿ ਡਿਠੈ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਜੀਵੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: muhi dditthai tin kai jeeveeai har amrit chakhe |
lines.english: I live by beholding the faces of those who taste the Ambrosial Essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਪਰਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee har aap parakhe |
lines.english: God grants His Grace, and the Lord Himself tests them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਲਤ ਨ ਜਾਪਨੀ ਕੋ ਸਕੈ ਨ ਲਖੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak chalat na jaapanee ko sakai na lakhe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, His play is not known; no one can understand it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧਾ ਭਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu sang saadhaa bhakhe |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment are burnt away, in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਈ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਸੁਹਾਵੜਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਵੈ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak soee dinas suhaavarraa jit prabh aavai chit |
lines.english: O Nanak, that day is beautiful, when God comes to mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak mitraaee tis siau sabh kichh jis kai haath |
lines.english: O Nanak, become friends with the One, who holds everything in His hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਫਿਟੁ ਭਲੇਰੀ ਰੁਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jit din visarai paarabraham fitt bhaleree rut |1|
lines.english: Cursed is that day, no matter how pleasant the season, when the Supreme Lord God is forgotten. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਪੀਵਹੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam nidhaan hai mil peevahu bhaaee |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is Ambrosial Nectar; meet together and drink it in, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਸੇਈ ਕਾਂਢੀਅਹਿ ਇਕ ਵਿਖ ਨ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kumitraa seee kaandteeeh ik vikh na chaleh saath |2|
lines.english: They are accounted as false friends, who do not go with you, for even one step. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗੁਰ ਭੁਖ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar sevaa paarabraham gur bhukh rahai na kaaee |
lines.english: So serve the Supreme Lord God and the Guru, and you shall never be hungry again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਭ ਤਿਖਾ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat sukh paaeeai sabh tikhaa bujhaaee |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, peace is found, and all thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੁੰਨਿਆ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath puniaa amaraa pad paaee |
lines.english: All your desires shall be fulfilled, and you shall obtain the status of immortality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd toohai paarabraham naanak saranaaee |3|
lines.english: You alone are as great as Yourself, O Supreme Lord God; Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਧਾ ਤਿਨ ਸੁਆਉ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ladhaa tin suaau jinaa satigur bhettiaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who meet with the True Guru find the object of life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਠੜੋ ਹਭ ਠਾਇ ਊਣ ਨ ਕਾਈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ddittharro habh tthaae aoon na kaaee jaae |
lines.english: I have seen all places; there is no place without Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:
